calendar.matters:
Motion And Notice Of Hearing To Vacate Forfeiture And Exonerate Bail Bond Pursuant To Penal Code Section 1306(C);
Off Calendar Jun-27-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

REAL PARTY IN INTEREST LEXINGTON NATIONAL INSURANCE CORPORATION'S Motion To Vacate Forfeiture And Exonerate Bail Bond Pursuant To Penal Code Section 1306(C).

Lexington National Insurance Corp.'s unopposed "motion to vacate forfeiture and exonerate bail bond pursuant to Penal Code section 1306(c)" is granted.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order repeating the substantive portion of the court's ruling and including the bond information.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)

Motion To Set Aside Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-06-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

REAL PARTY IN INTEREST LEXINGTON NATIONAL INSURANCE CORPORATION'S Motion To Set Aside Summary Judgment is Granted. No opposition filed.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
